products.name: Defiant Micro Air Data Computer
products.descriptor: Best-in-class SWaP micro air data computer for multi-function probe, ±20° AoA/AoS

evidence.snippet:
DEFIANT
-------
![Defiant-Apollo-Endurance-Hyperion-WS-0R9A3959-800x264](https://www.aeroprobe.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/11/Defiant-Apollo-Endurance-Hyperion-WS-0R9A3959-800x264-2.png)
The Defiant is best in class for size, weight, and power. Optimized for use with a [Multi-function Air Data Probe](https://www.aeroprobe.com/multi-function-air-data-probes/), the Defiant provides measurements of angle-of-attack and angle-of-sideslip with no moving parts.
The Defiant operates over a +/-20° angle-of-attack and angle-of-sideslip range and up to 612 knots indicated airspeed.
[Specifications](https://www.aeroprobe.com/uads-defiant-and-hyperion-specifications-download)

The fourth generation μADCs are now available for orders. For more information, please visit [https://www.aeroprobe.com/micro-air-data-computer-models/](https://www.aeroprobe.com/micro-air-data-computer-models/)or contact [sales@aeroprobe.com](mailto:sales@aeroprobe.com).

products.name: Hyperion Micro Air Data Computer
products.descriptor: HALE micro air data computer for multi-function probe, AS8002-compliant, up to 75,000 ft

evidence.snippet:
Designed to operate at altitudes up to 75,000 ft, the Hyperion is ideal for High Altitude Long Endurance (HALE) applications where precise angle-of-attack, airspeed, and altitude are all critical to mission success.
[Specifications](https://www.aeroprobe.com/uads-defiant-and-hyperion-specifications-download)

products.name: Apollo Micro Air Data Computer
products.descriptor: Wide-range micro air data computer for multi-function probe, 10–612 knots indicated airspeed

evidence.snippet:
Optimized for use with a [Multi-function Air Data Probe](https://www.aeroprobe.com/multi-function-air-data-probes/), the Apollo provides measurements of angle-of-attack and angle-of-sideslip over a wide range of airspeed from 10 to 612 knots indicated airspeed.
The Apollo is the right choice to support missions with the widest range of airspeed without compromise.
[Specifications](https://www.aeroprobe.com/uads-apollo-specifications-download/)

products.name: Endurance Micro Air Data Computer
products.descriptor: High-maneuverability micro air data computer for multi-function probe, ±40° AoA/AoS range

evidence.snippet:
Optimized for use with a [Multi-function Air Data Probe](https://www.aeroprobe.com/multi-function-air-data-probes/), the Endurance provides measurements of angle-of-attack and angle-of-sideslip with no moving parts over a +/-40° angle-of-attack and angle-of-sideslip range.
When the mission requires high maneuverability or operation in near-stall or post-stall envelopes, the Endurance is the right choice.
[Specifications](https://www.aeroprobe.com/uads-endurance-specifications-download)

products.name: Atlas Micro Air Data Computer
products.descriptor: Pitot-static micro air data computer optimized for harsh-condition UAV missions with heated probes

evidence.snippet:
Optimized for use with a [Pitot-Static Probe](https://www.aeroprobe.com/pitot-static-probes/), the Atlas provides air data over a wide range of airspeed from 10 to over 612 knots indicated airspeed.
When paired with Aeroprobe’s heated and drained Pitot-Static probes, the Atlas is ideal for missions in harsh conditions such as rain and ice.
[Specifications](https://www.aeroprobe.com/µads-atlas-and-horizon-specifications-download)

products.name: Horizon Micro Air Data Computer
products.descriptor: HALE pitot-static micro air data computer, AS8002-compliant altitude, up to 75,000 ft

evidence.snippet:
The Horizon is designed to operate well beyond the ceiling of most manned aircraft and operates at altitudes up to 75,000 ft.
[Specifications](https://www.aeroprobe.com/µads-atlas-and-horizon-specifications-download)

products.name: Nova Micro Air Data Computer
products.descriptor: Compact lightweight pitot-static micro air data computer, 10–612 knots airspeed range

evidence.snippet:
Optimized for use with a [Pitot-Static Probe](https://www.aeroprobe.com/pitot-static-probes/), the Nova provides air data across a wide range of airspeeds from 10 to over 612 knots indicated airspeed.
Its compact, lightweight design is built for durability and dependable operation while delivering high performance without breaking your SWaP budget.
[Specifications](https://www.aeroprobe.com/uads-nova-specifications-download/)

products.name: Multi-function Air Data Probe
products.descriptor: Vaneless multi-hole probe measuring AoA, AoS, airspeed, and altitude for UAV integration

evidence.snippet:
### FEATURES
*   AoA & AoS error less than ±1°
*   Airspeed error less than ±1% or ±1 m/s
*   Standard acceptance angle up to +/- 20° AoA & AoS
*   Optional extended angle up to +/- 40° AoA & AoS
*   As low as 15 grams mass
*   Straight, L-Shaped, and Strut Mounted geometries

products.name: Pitot-Static Probes
products.descriptor: Drained heated pitot/pitot-static probes for UAV airspeed and altitude measurement

evidence.snippet:
### PITOT/PITOT-STATIC PROBE FEATURES:
*   Probes offered with or without a static ring
*   Designed to meet AS8006 performance standard
*   Drained tip designed to meet AS5562 rain standard
*   Low weight (as low as 15 g unheated and 20 g heated)

products.name: Total Air Temperature (TAT) Probe
products.descriptor: Kiel-based probe with thermocouple or RTD for airflow temperature measurement

evidence.snippet:
TOTAL AIR TEMPERATURE (TAT) PROBES
----------------------------------
![TOTAL AIR TEMPERATURE (TAT) PROBE](https://www.aeroprobe.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/10/TOTAL-AIR-TEMPERATURE-TAT-PROBE-800x264-1.jpg)
A Total Air Temperature (TAT) Probe has the same design as a Kiel probe, but also includes a thermocouple or RTD to measure the temperature of the air flow.

products.name: AeroFlow Software
products.descriptor: Multi-hole probe data processing and flow visualization software suite

evidence.snippet: AeroFlow is the premier [Multi-hole Probe](https://www.aeroprobe.com/multi-hole-probes/) data processing and visualization application for aerodynamicists. It applies Multi-hole Probe aerodynamic calibrations to measured pressure data to calculate the flow velocity vector, total and static pressure, Mach number, and total temperature.

products.name: Multi-hole Probes
products.descriptor: 3-, 5-, and 7-hole flow measurement probes for wind tunnels and turbomachinery

evidence.snippet:
### FEATURES
*   Spherical tip geometry
*   Standard tip diameter starting at 6.35mm
*   Capable of measuring flow vectors up to ±150 °
*   Temperature ratings up to 500° C
*   High accuracy NIST traceable aerodynamic calibrations

products.name: Aerodynamic Probe Calibration
products.descriptor: NIST-traceable on-site aerodynamic calibration service for multi-hole probes

evidence.snippet:
Aeroprobe aerodynamic probe calibrations are performed on-site by highly trained expert staff to produce the most accurate calibrations in the industry.
The Probe Calibration Process

products.name: Nova µADC
products.descriptor: Micro air data computer optimized for Pitot-Static Probe, 10–612+ KIAS range

evidence.snippet:
NOVA:
Optimized for use with a [Pitot-Static Probe](https://www.aeroprobe.com/pitot-static-probes/), the Nova provides air data across a wide range of airspeeds from 10 to over 612 knots indicated airspeed.
Its compact, lightweight design is built for durability and dependable operation while delivering high performance without breaking your SWaP budget.

*   Qualified to meet MIL-STD and DO standards
*   On-site calibration wind tunnels capable of near-hover to supersonic speeds
*   Designed and manufactured in the USA

products.name: Atlas µADC
products.descriptor: Gen4 micro air data computer for UAV flight data processing

evidence.snippet:
![uADC Gen4 Atlas or Horizon](https://www.aeroprobe.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/08/uADC-Gen4-Atlas-Horizon-IMG_0006-800x264-1.jpg)
Micro Air Data Computers collect data from various sensors, such as Multi-function Air Data Probes or Pitot Probes and processes this data to provide accurate and real-time information to the aircraft’s flight control systems, navigation systems, and displays.

products.name: Horizon µADC
products.descriptor: Gen4 micro air data computer for UAV flight data processing

evidence.snippet:

Micro Air Data Computers collect data from various sensors, such as Multi-function Air Data Probes or Pitot Probes and processes this data to provide accurate and real-time information to the aircraft’s flight control systems, navigation systems, and displays.
